text_block_list.text:
One day, Hishi Amazon is practicing her dance
moves by herself...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: One, two! One, two!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hm, something isn't right. I'm not feelin' the
oomph.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
If this was race practice, I would've just grabbed
someone for some competition, but... Hang on.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It's not like there's a rule against havin'
one-on-ones with dancing, right?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
If I understand you right, you think having a
dance partner would help you practice, like
partner running does?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yep. You're pretty good at dancing, right, Fuji?
You're practically the perfect partner to have a
dance-off against!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'll gladly take you on. It would be silly of
me to miss such a rare opportunity.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fans
text_block_list.text: Squeee! You've got this, Fuji!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: The heck?! Where did they come from?! Did you call them here?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Why, yes. I thought our little competition would
be all the more exciting if we had an audience!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Surely you weren't expecting us to simply sway
about leisurely just because it's a dance?

Fuji Kiseki glances my way furtively, signaling her
intention to do her best to bring out Hishi
Amazon's full potential.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... Fine by me! Let's see how long you can stay
all calm and cool like that!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Now that's the Hishiama I like to see! Looks like I
was correct to invite an audience!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'm not losin' this! Keep your eyes peeled, Teach!
choice_data_list: Go full throttle and win this thing!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you know it! I'll knock you and your
audience right over, Fuji!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It seems you're properly fired up now, but I won't
be bested on the stage!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Heh, how was that?! You finally scared of my full
potential now?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
That was pretty good. You were truly ablaze like
an undulating flame.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fans
text_block_list.text:
Hishiama's dancing was so intense... But when it
comes to footwork, Fuji can't be beat!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, guess I still have a ways to go. It's not a
proper win if I can't wow the audience.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, certainly. I need a fair bit of practice
myself—if I want to exceed your full potential,
that is.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Good! But I'm winnin' next time for sure!

With this experience, Hishi Amazon brushes up
her dancing—racer style.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That's true. We're talkin' about Fuji here, so I
need to keep my cool!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hah!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, looks like you've gotten a real power-up
from working with your trainer.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fans
text_block_list.text:
Did you see that?! Hishiama's dancing totally
rivaled Fuji's!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
So they think my dancing's on par with yours,
huh? Guess this is a draw, then.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. But you know, you're starting to attract
more and more attention as the days go by.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
As an entertainer, I can't allow myself to be
outdone, neither in racing nor dancing!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Haha, you always act so cool 'n' collected—it's
fun seein' you all fired up!

And so, Hishi Amazon improves her dance skills
through some friendly competition.
